name: HW3 Applied: Zero-Shot Super Resolution
description: Grading spec for HW3 applied ZSSR implementation

tests.name: model_defined
tests.description: ZSSRNet class exists and is a nn.Module

tests.name: model_output_shape
tests.description: Forward output has correct spatial dims (scale_factor * input)

tests.name: dataset_defined
tests.description: ZSSRDataset class exists and returns dict with HR/LR keys

tests.name: dataset_shapes
tests.description: Dataset __getitem__ returns dict with correct HR/LR shapes

tests.name: psnr_improves
tests.description: After training, PSNR > bicubic baseline (code inspection)

tests.name: analysis
tests.description: Written analysis of ZSSR performance vs bicubic

tests.name: understanding
tests.description: Explanation of patch recurrence concept in ZSSR

tests.name: visualization
tests.description: Training curves and comparison images visualized

analysis.excellent: Clear explanation of ZSSR advantages over bicubic, quantified improvements, discussion of limitations
analysis.good: Good explanation of improvements, mostly quantified

understanding.excellent: Deep explanation of patch recurrence, connection to image statistics, mentions internal vs external patches
understanding.good: Clear explanation of how recurrence helps training
